name: loom-core
description: Core Loom Markdown-native AI work protocol skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Core Markdown-native protocol skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Loom Core provides using-Loom doctrine and canonical record skills for recoverable AI knowledge work.
defaultPrompt: Use using-loom before any Loom work.
Use Loom Core to create and maintain canonical Loom records.
Optional Loom Weaver support for Codex uses a custom agent TOML installed under ~/.codex/agents/loom-weaver.toml.
After installing that TOML, ask Codex in natural language to use the loom-weaver custom agent for pre-implementation shaping.
Codex plugins do not currently document @<agent> custom-agent invocation or plugin-shipped profiles.
Treat Codex preload behavior as requiring separate runtime validation.
